evals.name: vue-naive-issues-list
evals.prompt: Build a Pulse (issues tracker) using Vue 3 + Naive UI + Pinia + Vue Router + Tailwind v4. AppShell + IssuesList page with sticky header, sortable columns, status filter, 50 mock issues. Apply the taste-saas skill's patterns.
evals.expected_output: A runnable Vue 3 project (source only — no install) under outputs/ following the skill's 4-layer elevation, density tokens, div+flex sticky header, server-style filter contract, URL sort sync. No React/shadcn fallback.

evals.name: nextjs-shadcn-issues-list
evals.prompt: Build a Pulse (issues tracker) using Next.js 15 App Router + shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 + TanStack Query. AppShell + IssuesList with sticky header, sortable, status filter, 50 mock issues. Apply the taste-saas skill.
evals.expected_output: A Next.js App Router project (source only) under outputs/ — AppShell as Server Component, IssuesList as Client Component, following the skill's patterns. No React Router or Vite fallback.

evals.name: svelte-skeleton-issues-list
evals.prompt: Build a Pulse (issues tracker) using SvelteKit + Skeleton UI v3 + Tailwind v4 + @tanstack/svelte-query. AppShell + IssuesList with sticky header, sortable, status filter, 50 mock issues. Apply the taste-saas skill.
evals.expected_output: A SvelteKit project (source only) under outputs/ — using Svelte 5 runes preferred, Skeleton UI primitives, following the skill's patterns. No React/Vue fallback.
